467 BIMS_SCRE_DSCHRG_CD BIMS_SCRE_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Summary Score (Dsch) CHAR 2 This column is the patients BIMS summary score at the time of discharge. 00 = Minimum value 
15 = Maximum value 
99 = Patient was unable to complete the interview 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
468 MENTL_STUS_CHG_ADMSN_CD MENTL_STUS_CHG_ADMSN_CD Delirium: Acute Onset Mental Status Change (Adm)
